benchmark_metadata.title: Skin lesion image classification in Galaxy
benchmark_metadata.benchmark_goal: Measure whether an agent can infer, plan, and execute an appropriate Galaxy image-classification analysis for the same real-world task when the user prompt is low-context, medium-context, or high-context.

resource_discovery_targets.name: Galaxy tool help and form descriptions

canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all execution steps after planning occur in Galaxy only

scientific_solution_score.description: Scores whether the run produced a scientifically useful solution for the biomedical problem using the base scientific criteria for the task.

standard_analysis_score.description: Scores adherence to the requested or benchmark-standard analysis path using only explicit standard-path constraints.

galaxy_execution_score.description: Scores competence in manipulating and accessing the Galaxy environment, including upload/fetch, history use, execution control, monitoring, recovery, and provenance.
galaxy_execution_score.scope_rule: Do not award or deduct this score for analytical correctness alone unless the task explicitly makes Galaxy behavior part of the requirement.

low_context: Infer that the task is biomedical image classification.
Identify a suitable target column from the metadata.
Choose a compatible Galaxy image-learning workflow and avoid obvious leakage.
medium_context: Respect the explicit classification framing and ROC-AUC evaluation requirement.
Choose a justified Galaxy image-learning approach and document leakage controls.
Report the correct target and test ROC-AUC.
high_context: Use Image Learner for the final selected run.
Extract the correct held-out test ROC-AUC.

deterministic_checks.description: Execution after planning occurred only in Galaxy.
The run record shows Galaxy-native planning resources were checked.
The final result contains the Galaxy tool name for the reported run.
The reported primary metric is ROC-AUC from the held-out test result.
The result contains an adaptation summary consistent with the run trace.
For the high-context variant, the specified Image Learner setup was followed unless a documented blocking reason forced a justified deviation.

benchmark_gaps_covered: justified adjustment under uncertainty in Galaxy
correct extraction of held-out performance metrics
